title: agrostis vulgaris var. dubia
intro: Agrostis vulgaris var. dubia, also known as a type of bentgrass, is a perennial grass species that is commonly found in wetlands and along streams. The medicinal properties of Agrostis vulgaris var. dubia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the digestive system. Agrostis vulgaris var. dubia is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a poultice or compress to apply its medicinal properties topically.
